stories.title: Argentina show why they're reigning World Cup cham...
stories.summary: Argentina flipped the script yet again with two late goals to stun England, sending them to the World Cup final with a chance to repeat as champions vs. Spain.

stories.title: World Cup Daily: Martínez with winner vs. England ...
stories.summary: Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition as Argentina book a spot in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final.

stories.title: Messi, Argentina stun England late to reach final
stories.summary: Argentina sealed a dramatic semifinal fightback against England at Mercedes-Benz Stadium with two goals in the final five minutes to clinch a 2-1 win and book a World Cup final clash with Spain on Sunday.

stories.title: Sources: Kamara reworks deal to stay with Saints
stories.summary: Saints running back Alvin Kamara will play for New Orleans in 2026 on a reworked contract.

stories.title: Pickens to play on $27.3M tag as deadline passes
stories.summary: Cowboys wide receiver George Pickens will officially play the 2026 season on his $27.3 million franchise tender after Wednesday's 4 p.m. ET deadline for tagged players to agree to long-term contracts passed.
